options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: skaia
options.description:
Select which slots are part of Skaia instead of the Medium's topology.
These will be able to send/receive items to/from all Medium worlds.

Good for meta-games like APBingo or a group puzzle slot

Valid keys are the names of other slots in the multiworld or the slot number directly

options.name: medium_topo
options.description:
Select the type of topology the Medium has.

Ring: Each game only has items for itself and the next in the ring.
Dual: Items can flow in both directions across the ring.
SBURB: each game exclusively has item for the next, not its own.
    WARNING: this last mode is extremely likely to fail generation.
    Enable at least one decently-sized Skaia world and turn on progression only mode for any chance of generating.
Custom: comma-separated list of offsets to connected worlds. These work modulo the amount of worlds in the Medium.
    Here's how the other options translate into this one:
    - Ring: "0,1"
    - Dual: "-1,0,1"
    - SBURB: "1"

options.name: medium_rando
options.description: Randomize the order of the player worlds in the Medium

options.name: progression_only
options.description: Only affect placement of progression items, allow filler to be placed freely

options.name: remove_self
options.description:
Remove this world from the multiworld at the end of generation.
Requires this to be the last slot in the multiworld and no item links to be active.

options.name: medium_slots
options.description:
Specify which slots qualify for inclusion in the Medium. Slots specified as Skaia slots are removed from this.
Special values:
    **ALL** - all slots except for SBURBelago ones
    **BETWEEN** - all slots between this and the previous SBURBelago slot in slot order
    **UNTIL** - all slots before this slot

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.
